brief_notes: Exceptional writing with rich context, well-integrated Related Work. All numerics match: 8 ECoG subjects (avg age 41+/-14, IQ 96+/-18), 7 EEG (27+/-3.6), 6 SEEG (46+/-16.6), sampling 1200/2000Hz, -7/-6 dB SNR, 50-60% sensitivity, SPRiNT <0.3, 4.16 max entropy, CHO 3.82/4.05, FOOOF 4.15/4.15, 7Hz auditory, 11Hz/450ms auditory, 7Hz/450ms motor, 17Hz Broca, 8Hz/450ms hippocampus, 200ms RT, 300ms peak offset, 950ms onset, 250/900ms de/re-sync. Good discussion integrating theory and application.
